"[13] PER RSO IF HIS VEH IS DRIVEABLE - HE CAN GO 98 AND DEPUTY WILL CALL HIM FOR 11-10"

"[3] APPEARED HBD AND TOOK OFF RUNNING FROM THE VEH "
"[1] CALLER TO STAM - REPORTING SOLO VEH TC // TOYT TACOMA, 23882G3 VS TREE"
